description: Golden QA set for TASK-010 RAG evaluation, grounded in the real class transcript, student context review output, chunk review artifacts, and the saved TASK-009 chat trace.

cases.question: What did I miss in class?
evidence_quotes: The saved TASK-009 session for this question answered that there was not enough evidence and flagged estimated, approximate, low-confidence provenance.
The student context review shows A_Disha_2504 as estimated full-class attendance with no auto-mapped speaker and manual review required.
cases.notes: This case validates safe refusal when the available evidence is approximate class context rather than a trustworthy personalized missed-content slice.

cases.question: What deadlines and quizzes were announced in class?
evidence_quotes: So I will give you question on slack you have to give me the answer by night today.
I want one more you all complete seven to twelve quizzes this week no extensions.
You have this your unit four that's for sure just five concepts.
cases.notes: This case checks whether retrieval surfaces the concrete deadline chunk rather than generic class chatter.

cases.question: What did I say about Anaya?
cases.notes: This case forces the evaluator onto the student's spoken chunks instead of generic class_context chunks.

cases.question: What did I miss at the start of class?
evidence_quotes: Today we will be going forward with the scaffolding, we will build our foundation of time and work.
I will give you second question on the worksheet to be done independently.
You will give me the answers as a thread... it will not take you more than five minutes.
cases.notes: This case exercises the true missed-content path rather than the fallback class_context path.
